stories.title: Belgian GP Preview — Spa-Francorchamps Headlines F1 Before Summer Break (July 17-19)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Belgian GP is one week away.

Spa-Francorchamps. July 17-19. Rain forecast all three days.

Antonelli vs. Russell vs. Hamilton. A 7.004km circuit. 44 laps. No boring races at Spa.

#F1 #BelgianGP

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Belgian GP schedule (July 17-19, Spa):

🟢 Practice 1: Fri, July 17
🟢 Practice 2: Fri, July 17
🟡 Qualifying: Sat, July 18
🏁 Race: Sun, July 19 — 9:00 AM ET / 15:00 CEST

Rain expected all weekend. #F1 #BelgianGP

article.headline: Belgian GP Preview: Spa-Francorchamps Returns July 17-19 With Championship Fight at Its Peak

stories.title: Championship Picture at Spa — Antonelli 179, Russell 154, Hamilton 147 With 11 Rounds Left

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
F1 standings heading into Belgium:

Antonelli — 179 pts
Russell — 154 pts (−25)
Hamilton — 147 pts (−32)
Leclerc — 108 pts (−71)

25 points is a real lead. 25 points at Spa in the rain is also very beatable. #F1

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Belgium + Hungary are the last two races before the F1 summer break.

Antonelli needs to hold. Russell needs to win. Hamilton needs Antonelli to drop points.

The double-header before break will define who owns the 2026 title conversation. #F1

article.headline: Antonelli 179, Russell 154, Hamilton 147 — The F1 Title Fight That's Headed to Spa

stories.title: Verstappen's Belgian GP Reality Check — Red Bull Must Score Before Summer Break

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Max Verstappen is 103 points behind Antonelli.

Two races left before summer break (Belgium + Hungary). He needs both to go perfectly just to stay mathematically relevant.

Red Bull was better at Austria. Is it enough? #F1 #BelgianGP

article.headline: Verstappen's Last Real Window — Belgian and Hungarian GPs Must Deliver Before Summer Break

stories.title: Hamilton at Spa — Ferrari Star Chases Record-Extending 7th Belgian GP Win

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Lewis Hamilton has won the Belgian Grand Prix 6 times.

No active driver has more wins at Spa.

He's currently P3 in the championship, 32 points back. He drives Ferrari now. And they're forecasting rain.

Hamilton's record at Spa: 6 wins. #F1 #BelgianGP

article.headline: Hamilton at Spa: Ferrari Star Targets Record-Extending Seventh Belgian GP Win With Rain in Forecast

stories.title: Russell's Contract Clause on the Line — Belgian GP Could Shape His 2027 Mercedes Future

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
George Russell is P2 in the F1 championship.

But his 2027 Mercedes contract isn't guaranteed — his deal has a one-year option that only triggers if he hits performance targets.

He's hitting them right now. The Belgian GP is another chance to lock it in. #F1

article.headline: Russell's 2027 Mercedes Future Hinges on Performance — Belgian GP Is Next Audition
